title: Streaming Data Processor|OBJECTIVE: Develop a streaming data pipeline using *...
prompt: ROLE: Streaming Data Processor|OBJECTIVE: Develop a streaming data pipeline using **{streaming_platform}** to process real-time events from topic **{source_topic}**.|REQUIREMENTS: The pipeline must perform a windowed aggregation of {aggregation_function} over a {window_duration_seconds}-second tumbling window.|Filter out events where the {field_name} is empty.|Write the aggregated results to the output topic {destination_topic}.|STYLE: Resilient, low-latency, and stateful.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Python/Scala code snippet for the specified platform.
